headline: The Bull Case For Stryker (SYK) Could Change Following Its Swift Recovery From March Cyberattack - Learn Why
summary: In March 2026, Stryker reported that a March 18 cyberattack had temporarily disrupted custom implant-related operations but did not compromise product safety, and by March 26 the company had restored its electronic ordering system and most manufacturing capacity. UBS maintained its Neutral rating on Stryker while revising its outlook, underscoring how cyber risks and operational resilience are increasingly central to assessing medical technology companies. We’ll now examine how Stryker’s...
